scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=packages/server & npm run dev --workspace=packages/client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/server && npm run build --workspace=packages/client
scripts.build:server: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/server
scripts.build:client: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/server && npm run lint --workspace=packages/client
